name: agrof-project
description: AGROF - AI Powered Crop Health Companion

scripts.amplify:copy-outputs: sh -c 'test -f amplify_outputs.json && cp -f amplify_outputs.json agrof-main/mobile/app/amplify_outputs.json && echo Copied amplify_outputs.json to Expo app || echo "No amplify_outputs.json at repo root — run npm run sandbox first"'

author: AGROF Team
